BoolProperty.Name: OptimizeGlobalData
BoolProperty.Description: Pass /Gw to compile global data into individual COMDAT sections.

BoolProperty.Name: OmitCoffGroupInfo
BoolProperty.Description: Pass /NOCOFFGRPINFO when linking a Release image. Ignored when PGO is enabled.

BoolProperty.Name: OmitRichHeader
BoolProperty.Description: Pass the undocumented /EMITTOOLVERSIONINFO:NO option to omit the Rich Header from a Release image. Ignored when PGO is enabled.
